name: ClawTrace
description: Sends OpenClaw agent traces to ClawTrace via OTLP

enabled.description: Set to false to disable all emission without uninstalling

tool_calls.description: Emit a log per tool call (input + output)

assistant_turns.description: Emit a log per assistant turn (model response + usage)

user_messages.description: Emit a log per user message

compaction_events.description: Emit a log per context compaction event
